name: codex-lark-plugin
description: Feishu-oriented Codex plugin for team knowledge retrieval and document-based task management.

interface.shortDescription: Query project docs and manage task docs
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex with Feishu-style team knowledge and document-based task workflows so developers can retrieve project docs and maintain task state through structured documents.
defaultPrompt: Find the latest product and project docs for a team
List the most relevant docs for a project or keyword
Create or update a task document for the team
